firstQuestion.title: First Question
firstQuestion.description: The original first substantive question in this conversation.

category.title: Category
category.description: Use Appointment, Admission, or General according to the routing rules.

patientId.title: Patient Id
patientId.description: Optional authenticated patient record Id. Leave blank for visitors.

conversationKey.title: Conversation Key
conversationKey.description: Use the Messaging Session RoutableId from agent context. Never ask the user for it.
